lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਗਏ ਖਿਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhram binas ge khin maeh |
lines.english: Their fears and doubts are dispelled in an instant.
The Lord is forever the Help and Support of the Saints.
The Supreme Lord God comes to dwell in their minds. ||1||
The Lord of the World is my wealth, property, youth and ways and means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਨਾਲੇ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਭ ਠਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghar baahar naale paramesar rav rahiaa pooran sabh tthaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Inside the home of the heart, and outside as well, the Transcendent Lord is always with us, permeating and pervading all places. ||1||Pause||
He continually cherishes and brings peace to my soul and breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਦਾਸ ਕਉ ਦੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਹਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: apane daas kau de raakhai haath |
lines.english: He reaches out with His Hand and saves His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਥ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nimakh na chhoddai sad hee saath |2|
lines.english: He does not abandon us, even for an instant; He is always with us. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har saa preetam avar na koe |
lines.english: There is no other Beloved like the Lord.
The Lord is our Mother, Father, Son and Relation.
The True Lord takes care of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਧਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਮਨਿ ਜੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee dhar prabh kaa man jor |
lines.english: My mind is filled with the Support and the Power of the Lord.
Without the Lord, there is no other at all.
Since the beginning of time, and throughout the ages, His devotees sing His Glorious Praises. ||3||
Nanak's mind is encouraged by this hope,
that God will accomplish my objectives in life. ||4||38||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਕਉ ਭਉ ਪੜਿਆ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bhai kau bhau parriaa simarat har naam |
lines.english: Fear itself becomes afraid, when the mortal remembers the Lord's Name in meditation.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਮਿਟੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਕੀ ਦਾਸ ਕੇ ਹੋਏ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal biaadh mittee trihu gun kee daas ke hoe pooran kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: All the diseases of the three gunas - the three qualities - are cured, and tasks of the Lord's slaves are perfectly accomplished. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਲੋਕ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਧਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har ke lok sadaa gun gaaveh tin kau miliaa pooran dhaam |
lines.english: The people of the Lord always sing His Glorious Praises; they attain His Perfect Mansion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਬਾਂਛੈ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤੀ ਹੋਇ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਜਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan kaa daras baanchhai din raatee hoe puneet dharam raae jaam |1|
lines.english: Even the Righteous Judge of Dharma and the Messenger of Death yearn, day and night, to be sanctified by the Blessed Vision of the Lord's humble servant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਲੋਭ ਮਦ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਅਭਿਮਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mad nindaa saadhasang mittiaa abhimaan |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, intoxication, egotism, slander and egotistical pride are eradicted in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਸੰਤ ਭੇਟਹਿ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਕੁਰਬਾਨ ॥੨॥੩੯॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: aise sant bhetteh vaddabhaagee naanak tin kai sad kurabaan |2|39|52|
lines.english: By great good fortune, such Saints are met. Nanak is forever a sacrifice to them. ||2||39||52||
He applies ceremonial religious marks to his body, but practices hypocrisy.
He gets up each day and tells lies.
One who harbors the five thieves, becomes the embodiment of these five.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਾਚੀ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਸਾਕਤ ਮੂਠੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur poore mukat na paaeeai saachee darageh saakat mootth |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Perfect Guru, liberation is not obtained. In the Court of the True Lord, the faithless cynic is plundered. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੁਰਿ ਝੁਰਿ ਪਚੈ ਜੈਸੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਅ ਰੰਡ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jhur jhur pachai jaise tria randd |1|
lines.english: He wastes away in sadness and pain, like a lonely widow. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਭ ਝੂਠੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam binaa sabh jhootth |
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, everything is false.
One who does not know the Lord's Creative Power is polluted.
but in the Court of the True Lord, he forfeits his honor. ||2||
If a person is polluted within, he may wash himself everyday on the outside,

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੀਪਿਐ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਸੁਚਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: leepiai thaae na such har maanai |
lines.english: Ritualistically plastering one's kitchen square does not make it pure in the Eyes of the Lord.
but he never places his feet on the right path.
He works for the sake of Maya,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin keea tis cheet na aanai |
lines.english: He never even remembers the One who created him.
He speaks falsehood, only falsehood, with his mouth. ||3||
deals with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
That person, unto whom the Creator Lord shows Mercy,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਨਹੀ ਭੰਗੁ ॥੪॥੪੦॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tis jan nahee bhang |4|40|53|
lines.english: says Nanak - no obstacles ever block his way. ||4||40||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗਾ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har naam bhagat siau laagaa rang |
lines.english: One who lovingly worships the Lord's Name,
The slanderer's lifestyle is filthy and polluted.
The entire universe curses the slanderer.
False are the dealings of the slanderer.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
The slanderer dies with the rest of the slanderers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਜਨ ਰਾਖੇ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਕੜਕਿਓ ਕਾਲੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham paramesar jan raakhe nindak kai sir karrakio kaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, protects and saves His humble servant. Death roars and thunders over the head of the slanderer. ||1||Pause||
The Lord is the Saving Grace and the Protector of His slave. ||1||
